name: timeline
title: Timeline
description: Vertical event rail (Timeline + TimelineItem) with colored markers, titles, timestamps, and content — for encounter history, activity feeds, and care-plan steps.

props.name: TimelineItem.marker
props.description: Icon inside the marker; falls back to a dot.

props.name: TimelineItem.markerTooltip
props.description: Tooltip on the marker — e.g. the event type/category.

props.name: TimelineItem.interactive
props.description: Hover-highlight + pointer affordance for a clickable event.

props.name: TimelineItem.last
props.description: Hide the connector below (set on the final item).

clinicalNotes: Order events most-recent-first for a chart history so the latest encounter is read first; marker color should encode event class (visit, lab, medication, immunization, acute event) consistently across a product, and never carry meaning by color alone — the title always states the event type. Timestamps are tabular-nums for clean vertical scanning.
